identity.name: Agri-Monitor R5
identity.description: A field-ready project monitoring dashboard for the Department of Agriculture Region 5, focusing on geospatial data and visual verification.

color_palette.name: Bicol Verdant
color_palette.description: A palette inspired by the lush landscapes of Bicol and the official agricultural tones, avoiding generic 'tech blue'.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - Represents stability, growth, and the institution.

secondary.description: Rice Stalk Gold - Represents harvest, value, and success.

accent.description: Fertile Clay - Used for call-to-actions and alerts. Earthy orange-brown.

background.description: Volcanic Ash / Pale Sage - Very light, almost white greens/greys for reduced eye strain in sunlight.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.fab: fixed bottom-20 right-4 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-accent text-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50

cards.project: bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow group relative
cards.stat: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-5 border border-primary/10 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between h-full

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-gray-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/50 focus:bg-white transition-all
inputs.search: pl-10 rounded-full border-none bg-white shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20

map.container: w-full h-[calc(100vh-64px)] rounded-none sm:rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner border border-gray-200 relative
map.marker_style: Custom SVG Pin with Status Color Ring
map.popup: bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-gray-100 p-0 w-64

map_integration.style: Clean, Desaturated features to make pins pop
map_integration.controls: Custom floating controls (Zoom, User Location, Layer Toggle)

universal_guidelines: Design for Sunlight: High contrast text and distinct borders are mandatory for field usage.
Touch Targets: All interactive elements must be at least 44x44px.
Data Density: Use 'Bento' grids for desktop, 'Stack' layouts for mobile.
No 'Generic Blue': Stick strictly to the 'Bicol Verdant' palette.
Animation: Use 'framer-motion' for smooth page transitions and list staggering.
Feedback: Immediate visual feedback on all upload/save actions (Toasts via 'sonner').
Empty States: Never leave a blank page. Use an agricultural illustration + clear CTA.
Map Hierarchy: Map pins must be z-indexed above map labels. Active pin z-index: 50.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI with the custom colors defined in 'color_palette'.
3. Create a layout wrapper that handles the responsive navigation (Sidebar on Desktop, Bottom Bar on Mobile).
4. Implement the 'Project Gallery' using a masonry or responsive grid layout.
5. Ensure the Map View takes up the full available height minus the header/nav.
6. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and empty states.
7. Mock the Google Maps API key if not provided in environment variables, or provide a clear setup instruction in README.
8. For the 'Add Project' flow, implement the image upload first, then extract EXIF, then show the form with pre-filled coordinates.
